label: full closeout
topWin: The website now has both a public intelligence spine and a maintainable CSP/policy spine, which removes two of the biggest drift risks exposed by the audit.
topGap: IGNIS is still stale because the project re-score command failed in closeout, and true local browser verification still is not the default path.
ignisNote: The repo now has a real public-intelligence spine and a shared policy-generation spine; next time, the missing piece is local-first verification and a working IGNIS refresh path.
